title: E2E: Research — Python dataclasses cheat sheet
body: Research Python dataclasses (stdlib). Write a concise cheat sheet as a markdown file called dataclasses-cheatsheet.md in the working directory. Cover: basic usage, field defaults, __post_init__, frozen, slots, inheritance. Max 100 lines.

cycle.prompt: You are researching this topic. Gather the key facts, patterns, and examples. Structure your output as raw notes organized by sub-topic. Do NOT write a polished document yet.
You are writing the final document from the gathered notes. Write a clean, concise cheat sheet as markdown. Save it to disk using the Write tool.
